title: dehaasia pauciflora
intro: Dehaasia pauciflora, also known as the Dehaasia tree or Indian olive, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dehaasia pauciflora include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Dehaasia pauciflora is prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and ointments, which are used to treat various health conditions.
